termsAndConditions.fieldValue:
1. Introduction
Welcome to our platform. By accessing or using this application, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. These terms govern the use of the services provided by the merchant through this application.

2. Orders
All orders placed through the application are subject to acceptance by the merchant. The merchant reserves the right to cancel or refuse any order for any reason including product availability, pricing errors, or suspected fraudulent activity.

3. Pricing
All prices displayed in the application are determined by the merchant and may change without prior notice. Taxes and additional charges may apply where applicable.

4. Payments
Payments can be made using supported payment methods such as online payment gateways or Cash on Delivery (if available). The merchant is responsible for processing and confirming the order.

5. Delivery
Delivery timelines are estimates and may vary based on location, product availability, and logistics conditions. The merchant will make reasonable efforts to deliver the order within the expected timeframe.

6. Cancellation & Refund
Orders may be canceled according to the merchant’s cancellation policy. Refunds, if applicable, will be processed according to the merchant's refund policy.

7. User Responsibilities
Users agree to provide accurate information while placing orders and must not misuse the application for unlawful purposes.

8. Limitation of Liability
The merchant shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use of the application or services.

9. Changes to Terms
The merchant reserves the right to update or modify these terms at any time without prior notice.

privacyPolicy.fieldValue:
1. Information We Collect
We may collect personal information such as:
Name
Phone number
Email address
Delivery address
Payment details
This information is collected to process orders and improve user experience.

2. How We Use Information
The collected information may be used for:
Processing orders
Customer support
Sending order updates
Improving services

3. Data Sharing
We do not sell or rent personal information. Data may only be shared with service providers such as payment gateways or delivery partners to fulfill orders.

4. Data Security
We take reasonable measures to protect user information from unauthorized access, misuse, or disclosure.

5. Cookies & Tracking
The application may use cookies or similar technologies to enhance user experience and analyze usage.

6. User Rights
Users may request access, correction, or deletion of their personal information by contacting the merchant.

7. Policy Updates
This Privacy Policy may be updated periodically. Continued use of the application constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

8. Contact Information
For any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact:
